steps.t: Bingo has eaten too much at the Welcoming Feast, and has asked you to find a healer in Maur Tulhau who might have a remedy for him.
Tea plants can be found outside Maur Tulhau, in the Gloomglens. Lili Gardhur gave you a knife and sent you to look for suitable tea plants outside Mau…
Lili Gardhur is in the central square of Maur Tulhau, in the Gloomglens.
Bingo is in the north-east corner of Maur Tulhau, suffering from an unhappy stomach. Lili Gardhur gave you some medicinal tea to bring to Bingo.
Bingo and his companions are in the north-east corner of Maur Tulhau.
Bingo has finished the medicinal tea, and now you should see if he is feeling better.
Lili Gardhur is in the central square of Maur Tulhau. Lili's medicinal tea did not seem to help Bingo's condition, and he asked you to see if she had …
A hot pot of tea is brewing on the milestone in the centre of Maur Tulhau. Lili Gardhur thinks that the other tea you brought to Bingo might have cool…
Bingo is in the north-east corner of Maur Tulhau, sipping the tea you brought to him.
Iola Isbrun is in the north-east corner of Maur Tulhau.
Bingo is in the north-east corner of Maur Tulhau.
